creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-08-13 16:27:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/waheela        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Waheela is a fullscreen interface for Amarok 2.x allowing for basic playback
  and volume control. It supports themes and can be locked using a password.
  
  WWW: http://www.kde-apps.org/content/show.php?content=108863
  
  PR:             ports/137648
  Submitted by:   Jason E. Hale <bsdkaffee at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1050    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/audio/waheela/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/waheela/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/waheela/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +53 -0     ports/audio/waheela/pkg-plist (new)
